text: The Ecuadoran spiny pocket mouse (Heteromys teleus) is a species of rodent in the family Heteromyidae. It is endemic to central western Ecuador where it is found at elevations from sea level to 2000 m on the coastal plain and western slopes of the Andes. It is threatened by deforestation and fragmentation of its remaining habitat.
